message:
test(parser): bd-7pxb transaction control, ATTACH/DETACH, EXPLAIN tests

Add 23 parser acceptance tests for §12.10-12.12:
- BEGIN DEFERRED/IMMEDIATE/EXCLUSIVE/CONCURRENT + TRANSACTION keyword
- COMMIT/END synonym, ROLLBACK, SAVEPOINT/RELEASE
- ATTACH/DETACH with cross-database dotted references
- EXPLAIN / EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN wrappers
- Parser support for BEGIN CONCURRENT (TransactionMode::Concurrent)

413 total parser tests passing, clippy clean, fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
